0.name: Prof. Candice
0.text: Newton’s Second Law explains the relationship between force, mass, and acceleration.

2.name: Prof. Candice
2.text: "The acceleration of an object is directly proportional to the net force acting on it but inversely proportional to its mass."

3.name: Prof. Candice
3.text: Hence, the infamous F=[font size=18]ma[/font] equation.

5.name: Prof. Candice
5.text: The harder you push something, the faster it accelerates.

6.name: Prof. Candice
6.text: But the heavier it is, the harder that becomes.

7.name: Prof. Candice
7.text: Here, try it on these carts.
